hero.description: Precision-crafted mattresses engineered with breathable layers, adaptive support systems, and refined materials — built to restore your body night after night.

categories.desc: Crafted collections designed to elevate every sleep experience.

products.title: Our Collection
products.desc: Discover mattresses engineered for every sleep style.

whyLitmad.title: Why Choose LITMAD?
whyLitmad.desc: Designed with precision engineering and premium materials, LITMAD mattresses redefine comfort, durability, and sleep quality.

statements.title: Engineered for Alignment
statements.desc: Every layer is structured to support natural spine posture while maintaining adaptive comfort.

statements.title: Built to Last
statements.desc: High-resilience foam and durable materials preserve shape, performance, and structure over time.

statements.title: Refined Comfort Experience
statements.desc: Breathable construction ensures airflow and optimal hygiene night after night.

cta.title: Invest in Better Sleep
cta.desc: Experience the precision, comfort, and durability that define LITMAD.

hero.title: Let’s Begin the Conversation
hero.description: Whether you have questions about comfort, materials, or delivery — our team is ready to assist you.

hero.title: Comfort Is Structured Silence.
hero.description: It is the invisible architecture that supports the body — night after night.

frame.title: Every Layer Carries Intention.
frame.description: What feels effortless is shaped through calibration, discipline, and repetition.

editorial.title: Engineering Beyond Surface Softness
editorial.lead: Softness is immediate. Structure is lasting.
editorial.paragraph1: Our mattresses are engineered to maintain alignment, distribute pressure evenly, and regulate airflow — without losing integrity over time.
editorial.paragraph2: Comfort is not padding. It is layered architecture.

scale.lead: As infrastructure expanded, precision remained constant.
scale.paragraph2: Growth strengthened discipline — it never replaced it.

commitment.title: The Commitment
commitment.paragraph1: We do not manufacture comfort. We construct foundations that support life — quietly, consistently, and without compromise.
commitment.paragraph2: Because rest should never feel temporary. It should feel certain.

locations.title: Visit Litmad
locations.description: Experience our craftsmanship in Constantine or explore our showroom in Algiers.

showroom.description: Discover our collections in a refined environment.

footer.brandDescription: Premium mattress manufacturing focused on durability, precision, and long-term comfort engineered for restorative sleep.
